goal: Close the unfinished A1 branch from v2 to a final PROMOTE/REJECT verdict, and only if A1 fails open exactly one next low-friction candidate through the full acceptance chain.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable: never retune its hours, days, thresholds, or execution parameters
Any candidate must pass strict-additive, permissive-integration, ownership, and cannibalization proof before promotion
No medium-friction wave B until both low-friction branches (A1 + one of A2/A3) are fully closed with no promoted candidate
Only one active low-friction branch may be investigated at a time
Maximum 3-4 features per prototype; maximum 2-3 prototypes per branch
If a candidate loses positivity after removing its strongest historical segment, it is not mainline-quality

slices.title: Выбор ровно одной следующей low-friction ветки (если A1 не promoted)
slices.hypothesis: If A1 was not promoted, select exactly one next low-friction branch (A2_iv_acceleration preferred, then A3_broader_cl_transition) and prepare its hypothesis and feature contracts.
slices.objective: If A1 was not promoted, select exactly one next low-friction branch (A2_iv_acceleration preferred, then A3_broader_cl_transition) and prepare its hypothesis and feature contracts.
success_criteria: Exactly one next branch is selected with documented rationale
Feature and hypothesis contracts are ready for clean testing
evidence_requirements: Exactly one next branch is selected with documented rationale
Feature and hypothesis contracts are ready for clean testing

slices.title: A2_iv_acceleration: прототип и standalone-тест
slices.hypothesis: Test whether IV dynamics produce a viable specialist layer by building a compact feature set and running it through plausibility and standalone checks on the base-absent surface.
slices.objective: Test whether IV dynamics produce a viable specialist layer by building a compact feature set and running it through plausibility and standalone checks on the base-absent surface.
success_criteria: Either one mature A2 prototype survives plausibility and standalone tests, or an honest early rejection is recorded
evidence_requirements: Either one mature A2 prototype survives plausibility and standalone tests, or an honest early rejection is recorded

slices.title: A3_broader_cl_transition: прототип и standalone-тест
slices.hypothesis: Test whether a broader class of classifier transitions produces a viable specialist layer through transition features and base-absent surface evaluation.
slices.objective: Test whether a broader class of classifier transitions produces a viable specialist layer through transition features and base-absent surface evaluation.
success_criteria: Either one mature A3 prototype survives plausibility and standalone tests, or an honest early rejection is recorded
evidence_requirements: Either one mature A3 prototype survives plausibility and standalone tests, or an honest early rejection is recorded
